visual_description: A high-angle, slightly shaky shot looks down into a busy, modern office building lobby. The audio is filled with the loud, echoing sound of multiple pairs of feet running quickly across a hard, possibly tiled, floor. The sound is a rapid, percussive clatter that creates a sense of urgency and commotion. In the foreground, the dark silhouettes of people's heads and shoulders are visible, suggesting the camera is positioned on an upper level. Below, a group of men in business attire, mostly light blue shirts, are seen walking and milling about in a well-lit, open-plan area. The lobby features a checkered tile floor, a staircase on the right, and a reception desk in the background. The overall lighting is cool and functional. In the top left corner, the Chinese characters "风行网" are displayed in a white, stylized font. The camera pans slightly, following the movement of the people in the lobby. The camera cuts to a medium close-up, focusing on a man in the center of the group. He has short, dark hair and is wearing a light blue collared shirt with a patterned tie. He has a serious, focused expression as he walks forward. Other men in similar business attire are visible around
